picks.quote: Who is it that's going to challenge a guy like Islam Makache? Is it Kos? I don't think so. Is it Marco Moros? I DON'T THINK SO.
I KNOW WHO. Kamaro Usman... THIS COULD DEFEND AND HE COULD STRIKE AND he's just a little bit bigger, a little bit taller. SO THAT BEING SAID, GUYS, DANA WHITE BOOK IS A MAKIT VERSUS KAMAR USMAN.
